data.title: Eli Lilly's Experimental Drug Retatrutide Delivers Strong Weight Loss In Late-Stage Trial
data.description: In a recent update, Eli Lilly announced that its new drug retatrutide has shown more effective weight loss results compared to existing treatments. The late-stage trial data revealed significant advancements in weight reduction. This development signifies a promising breakthrough in the field of pharmaceuticals, with attention drawn to the potential impact of retatrutide. The drug's performance highlights a substantial improvement in achieving weight loss targets, presenting new possibilities for patients struggling with obesity. This update indicates a notable advancement in medical research and offers hope for enhanced treatment options.

data.title: Entrepreneur Fred Schaufeld Is Always Ready To Rock And Roll
data.description: During his college years, Fred Schaufeld was initially reserved, but eventually embraced stepping out of his comfort zone. Now, as an entrepreneur, he is always prepared to take on new challenges. This story of Schaufeld's transformation was recently featured in an article by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Bascom Group Leases Prime Downtown Long Beach Vacant Ground Floor Retail Space to the Dirty Birds Restaurant, a Popular San Diego Restaurant and Sports Bar, Featuring Chicken Wings
data.description: Located in downtown Long Beach, California, The Bascom Group, LLC, has achieved a milestone by leasing a 3,039 square feet ground floor second-generation restaurant space to the Dirty Birds. Situated at 200 Pine Avenue, this prime location in the heart of downtown Long Beach is sure to attract a lot of attention. This deal marks a significant development for both the Bascom Group and Dirty Birds as they make their mark in the bustling Long Beach market.

data.title: FedEx Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: FedEx Corporation (NYSE: FDX) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings after the market closes on Thursday, March 19. Analysts are projecting a decrease in quarterly earnings to $4.13 per share, compared to $4.51 per share in the same period last year. The consensus forecast for FedEx's quarterly revenue stands at $23.42 billion, up from $22.16 billion a year ago. Data from Benzinga Pro shows that the company has exceeded revenue expectations for four consecutive quarters and in five of the last 10 quarters in total. FedEx's stock price experienced a 1.4% decline, closing at $349.74 on Wednesday. For further insights, readers can view the most recent analyst ratings on Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page, where information can be sorted by various criteria such as stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, and rating changes. Explore Benzinga's detailed analysis for more on the accuracy of their analysts.

data.title: Roundstone Announces 2026 Medical Captive Forum in Dallas Focused on Building Resilient Health Plans
data.description: In Rocky River, Ohio, on March 19, 2026, Roundstone Insurance is addressing the ongoing issue of rising healthcare costs for employers nationwide. The company is uniting key figures from various sectors of the healthcare industry to discuss potential solutions. Roundstone recently revealed plans for its yearly event...

data.title: U Power Limited Announces Pricing of $6.0 Million Public Offering
data.description: U Power Limited, a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol UCAR, recently disclosed that it has priced an underwritten public offering of 13,360,000 shares. The company specializes in AI-integrated solutions for advanced energy grids and smart transportation systems. This news was made public on March 19, 2026, in Shanghai.

data.title: Evolent announces appointment of Archie Mayani as chief product officer
data.description: An experienced professional with a successful history of introducing cutting-edge ideas from top organizations like GHX, Change Healthcare, UnitedHealth Group, and Amazon, has joined the industry. On March 19, 2026, in Washington, Evolent Health, Inc. (NYSE: EVH), a firm dedicated to improving health results for individuals facing complicated ailments, announced the addition of this accomplished individual to their team.

data.title: "Yeah, No" Benefit Concert Raising Funds to Support St. Anthony Village Community After Federal Immigration Operations
data.description: Support the SAV Mutual Aid by contributing to their cause of assisting neighbors with vital necessities such as rent and food. Attend the "Yeah, No" benefit concert on Wednesday, March 25th, in Minneapolis. All proceeds raised will benefit this mission.

data.title: History In Motion Studios Announces Development of Bible Anime Series to Meet Global Demand for Faith-Centered Media
data.description: A Christian studio led by women has developed a TV-MA biblical anime series that targets both faith-based and mainstream audiences. History In Motion Studios, an independent animation studio established in Fort Worth, Texas, by Hispanic immigrant Edith Alvarado, made the announcement on March 19, 2026. This move is aimed at appealing to a global audience and potentially reaching a wide range of viewers.

data.title: AbsenceSoft Wins Lighthouse Tech Award for Fourth Consecutive Year
data.description: AbsenceSoft, a prominent SaaS platform specializing in leave of absence and accommodations management, has recently gained recognition for its consistent success in providing tangible benefits to HR teams. Their focus on an AI-first strategy has significantly propelled their efforts, reflecting a commitment to innovation and efficiency. This acknowledgment comes as AbsenceSoft solidifies its position in the industry, showcasing impressive figures in terms of measurable impact and client satisfaction. This update was reported from Denver on March 19, 2026.

data.title: AI Agent Traffic Jumps 1,300%. ChannelEngine Introduces AI Attribute Builder for the Next Phase of Ecommerce
data.description: A recent development in product data technology is assisting brands and retailers in addressing deficiencies, while the influence of AI-driven discovery is transforming the way products are showcased on the internet. In the city of New York, on March 19, 2026, during Shoptalk Spring 2026, AI becomes a focal point revealing a significant underlying transformation. Customers are witnessing a shift in how products are presented online, with significant implications for brands and retailers.

data.title: Parks Associates Announces Comcast, Alarm.com, Silicon Labs, AWS, and More to Join 30th Annual CONNECTIONS™ Conference May 5-7 in California
data.description: In PLANO, Texas, on March 19, 2026, Parks Associates announced the upcoming 30th annual CONNECTIONS™ conference, scheduled for May 5-7 at the Hyatt Regency Santa Clara. This event will unite industry executives, including those from Comcast, to discuss the impact of AI and connected platforms on the smart home market.

data.title: Discern Security Launches AI-Native Agentic Platform for Faster Security Outcomes
data.description: A recent announcement from Discern Security revealed their innovative platform that allows security teams to evaluate their security posture, gain valuable insights, prioritize actions, automate remediation processes, and align strategies. The new agentic AI technology will be showcased at the RSA Conference 2026 in Sunnyvale, California. This advanced platform aims to enhance security effectiveness and efficiency for organizations.

data.title: PetSafe Partners with Rachel Bilson to Support Fostering Through ASPCA
data.description: A recent campaign emphasizing the significance of providing a soothing environment for pets from the beginning showcases PetSafe's products now easily accessible at Walmart in KNOXVILLE, Tenn. This initiative by PetSafe Brands™, the top supplier of cat and dog products globally, underscores the importance of fostering pets in a stress-free manner. The campaign was launched on March 19, 2026, with a focus on creating a comfortable atmosphere for pets right from day one.
